features: Moisturises and helps prevent spots and blemishes
Fragrance free for even sensitive skin
Leaves skin feeling soft, smooth and beautiful everyday
Oil-free; lifts away dirt and oil
description: Product Description Clean & Clear Dual Action Moisturiser combines oil-free moisturisers which won't clog pores with a proven spot-fighting ingredient to help prevent spots and blemishes. Leaves skin feeling soft and smooth everyday. How to use: cleanse your skin thoroughly before applying moisturiser. Smooth over face and neck as required. Use daily as part of your Clean & Clear routine for skin that's really clean, clear and under control. Volume: 100 ml. Ingredients [PR-000278], Aqua, Propylene Glycol, C12-15 Alkyl Benzoate, Cetyl Alcohol, Stearyl Alcohol, Menthyl Lactate, Cyclohexasiloxane, Cyclopentasiloxane, Propylene Glycol Isostearate, Palmitic Acid, Stearic Acid, Glyceryl Stearate, Glycerin, Salicylic Acid, PEG-100 Stearate, Sodium Hydroxide, Dimethicone, Sodium Isostearoyl Lactylate, Acrylates/c10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Carbomer, Disodium EDTA, Phenoxyethanol, Methylparaben, Ethylparaben, Propylparaben Manufacturer Contact Information Johnson & Johnson Ltd., Maidenhead, SL6 3UG.
